name: Refactor for complexity: files ≤400 lines, functions ≤100 lines

description: Baseline: 15 oversized files + 43 oversized functions = 58 violations
refactor(db): split scoped.ts (1435 LOC) into per-domain modules

asi.hypothesis: split scoped.ts 1435-line god-class into 10 per-domain modules under lib/db/scoped/, leaving a thin delegator facade
asi.result: scoped.ts 1435 → ~330 lines, ScopedDB public API unchanged, all 2444 tests pass

description: Split link-card.tsx — file drops but funcs explode (+4 over-100 functions)

asi.hypothesis: split link-card.tsx 499-line render fn into GridLinkCardView, ListLinkCardView, InlineEditArea, ScreenshotSourceDialog, BreakdownSection
asi.result: file size -1 (838→4 smaller files all <400), but introduced 4 new funcs >100 lines: list-view 216, grid-view 176, link-card 153, inline-edit-area 142
asi.rollback_reason: net +1 violation: traded 1 huge func for 4 medium funcs
asi.next_action_hint: either extract row-level subcomponents within each view, or target easier files first (sidebar.tsx, backy-page, search-command-dialog) where one function dominates

description: refactor(api): split 311-line PATCH /v1/links/[id] into validators + builder

asi.hypothesis: extract PATCH validation + statement building from 311-line route handler into patch-helpers.ts
asi.next_target: viewmodels/useLinksViewModel.ts 488 lines (file violation), and similar viewmodel files

description: refactor(vm): split useLinksViewModel.ts into 4 files; decompose 2 large hooks

asi.hypothesis: split useLinksViewModel.ts into 3 per-hook files + decompose useLinkCardViewModel (153 lines) into 4 sub-hooks + extract executeSave/buildUpdatePayload from useInlineLinkEditViewModel (145 lines)
asi.result: useLinksViewModel.ts 488→70 lines; useLinkCardViewModel now ~50 lines, useInlineLinkEditViewModel ~70 lines, useCreateLinkViewModel ~85 lines, all sub-hooks <30 lines

description: refactor(sidebar): split 568-line file into collapsed/expanded sub-views

asi.hypothesis: split sidebar.tsx (568 lines, 404-line Sidebar fn) into nav-config, collapsible-nav-group, sidebar-collapsed, sidebar-expanded sub-components
asi.result: sidebar.tsx 568→90; Sidebar render 404→30 lines; all extracted components <100 lines

asi.hypothesis: decompose 274-line useIdeasViewModel into useIdeasData + useIdeasFilters + useIdeasMutations + useDeleteConfirm sub-hooks
asi.result: main hook ~70 lines, all sub-hooks <100 lines

description: refactor(vm): extract runUploadFlow + persisted-setting hooks from useUploadsViewModel

asi.hypothesis: extract runUploadFlow + usePersistedFlag/Number helpers from 262-line useUploadsViewModel
asi.result: useUploadsViewModel 262→75 lines; flow logic moved to viewmodels/uploads/runUploadFlow.ts

description: refactor(vm): decompose useXrayViewModel + useBackyViewModel into sub-hooks

asi.hypothesis: decompose useXrayViewModel (214) into config+tweet+bookmarks; decompose useBackyViewModel (211) into config+test/push+history+pull-webhook
asi.result: both main hooks now compose sub-hooks; 2 func violations removed

description: refactor(xray-page): split into parts, decompose TweetCard into sub-rows

asi.hypothesis: split xray-page.tsx (684 lines, 171-line TweetCard fn) into 4 part files; decompose TweetCard into AuthorRow/EntitiesBlock/MetadataRow/MetricsBar/MediaGrid

description: refactor(backy-page): split 447 LOC / 381-line fn into Push/Pull sections

asi.hypothesis: split backy-page.tsx (447 lines, 381-line BackyPage fn) into Push + Pull sections with internal sub-components (ConfigForm, ConfiguredView, TestResult, PushResult, HistoryPanel, CredentialsView, EmptyView)

description: refactor(search): split search-command-dialog into result items + handlers

asi.hypothesis: split search-command-dialog.tsx (435 lines, 364-line fn) into LinkResultItem, IdeaResultItem, TagBadges, HighlightText, useSearchHandlers, SearchEmptyHint

description: refactor(worker): split 610-line index.ts into 4 focused modules

asi.hypothesis: split worker/src/index.ts (610 LOC) into types.ts + d1-proxy.ts + analytics.ts + forward.ts; main file now hosts only fetch+scheduled handlers
asi.result: worker index 610→312; D1 proxy/UA parsing/forwarding isolated; 72 worker tests still pass

asi.hypothesis: extract useStoragePage hook + SummaryGrid from 209-line StoragePage
asi.result: StoragePage now ~75 lines; still leaves R2Section 192-line internal fn untouched (deferred)

description: refactor(webhook-page): extract WebhookUsageDocs to a separate file

asi.hypothesis: extract WebhookUsageDocs to a separate file
asi.result: webhook-page.tsx 412→232 (under 400). WebhookPage function still 221 lines but file is OK
